name: Access Token Manipulation
description: Detects token manipulation techniques used for privilege escalation
query:
// Detect token impersonation and manipulation
// Trigger on commands using token manipulation tools
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(Invoke-TokenManipulation|incognito|token::elevate|getsystem|ImpersonateLoggedOnUser|DuplicateToken)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
